name: Fortune Cookies-1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the softened butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the egg white and vanilla extract to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Gradually add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
4. Using a spoon, drop rounded teaspoons (about 5 ml) of the dough onto a greased cookie sheet, flattening each to about 3 inches in diameter.
5. Place the sheet in a preheated oven set to 400°F (200°C).
6. Bake for 3-4 minutes or until the edges turn golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
7. Using a spatula, transfer the cookies to a plate.
8. Turn each cookie over carefully.
9. Place a fortune message in the center of the cookie.
10. Fold the cookie in half and press the sides for a few seconds to seal.
11. Gently lift the cookie by its two ends and press the middle against the rim of a glass to give it a regular shape.
12. Transfer each cookie to a muffin mold to maintain its shape until completely cooled.
This recipe yields approximately 18 cookies.
